## Related issue

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] CI / repo hygiene

## Testing

How did you verify this works?

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` produces expected `dist/` files
- [ ] Manually ran the affected operation in a local n8n with `npm link`
- [ ] Updated `examples/` if I added a new tool or operation
- [ ] Updated `docs/SPEC.md` if I changed behavior or shape

## Security / IAM

- [ ] No new `exec`, `spawn`, `eval`, or filesystem writes added
- [ ] No new long-lived secrets read or stored
- [ ] If I changed `docs/iam-*.json`, the change is minimal and follows least privilege
- [ ] If I added a runtime dependency, it is Apache-2.0 / MIT / similar permissive and well-maintained

## Checklist

- [ ] I read CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] PR title follows Conventional Commits (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] All commits in this PR are signed off per the DCO (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
